name: Miku Nakano
trivia: The name Miku means 'three' (三) (mi) and 'beautiful black jewel, nine' (玖) (ku)
She is a huge fan of Japanese history, specifically the Sengoku period warriors.
Miku is notoriously bad at cooking, though she works incredibly hard to improve for Futaro.
Miku likes Matcha Soda.
Miku's headphones are a design mix of the Audio-Technica M50x and AR3bt SE.
Miku's phone number is 090-69143-73641 and her email address is n.miku0505@socomo.ne.jp.
Miku's voice actress, Miku Itou shared same name as her character, but different Kanji's first name writing. Miku (美来) for her voice actress name & Miku (三玖) for her characters name.

name: Nagomi Wahira
trivia: Her favorite food is chocolate.
Her skill is in horticulture.
Translating Nagomi's name means 'Peace Relief' in English. Her surname can be read as 'heiwa' which means peace.
Nagomi is the only main character whose ultimate fate is revealed in the epilogue. The fates of the other surviving members of the Café are left unknown.

name: Meiko "Menma" Honma

source.titleEng: Anohana: The Flower We Saw That Day
source.titleRomaji: Ano Hi Mita Hana no Namae wo Bokutachi wa Mada Shiranai.
source.titleJp: あの日見た花の名前を僕達はまだ知らない。

trivia: Menma makes an appearance in episode 1 of the anime Saenai Heroine no Sodatekata as figurines.
Like many other anime girls (and some guys), Menma entered Saimoe Contests.
Menma's favorite food was curry.
Menma is the youngest character to die in the series as she was only 10 years old at the time of her death.
Menma's name spelt backwards - (amnem) - is Latin for "the river", which is the location of her death.

name: Ritsu
trivia: Her official name is 'Autonomous Intelligence Fixed Artillery', but the class nicknamed her Ritsu.
Ritsu can make anything using the special plastic inside her, except weapons, as long as she has the data for the object.
Ritsu can be counted as a foreign transfer student as she was made in Norway, thus making her Norwegian by default.
Ritsu's best subject is math while her worst is physical education.
Ritsu's future goal is to reach a firing accuracy rate of 100% indoors.
Ritsu's special skill is manufacturing clothing objects.
Ritsu's social interaction software priority is honesty while her visual display software priority is guile.
Ritsu shares her birthday with Gakushu Asano.
Saki Fujita (Ritsu's Japanese voice actor) also voiced Hatsune Miku, a Japanese Vocaloid and another digital person similar to Ritsu.

name: Hinano Kurahashi
trivia: SKurahashi's best subject is Biology and her worst is Mathematics.
Kurahashi's future goal is to become a zoologist.
Kurahashi's hobbies are raising pets and collecting insects.
Kurahashi's past club before joining Class E was the Biology club.
Kurahashi's favorite food is a Blueberry Yogurt Parfait.
Kurahashi's most treasured possession is a complete collection of biology books.
Kurahashi's ability to ignore sleazy gossip is very high.
Kurahashi's bug in Koro Q is that her magic attracts insects.

name: Itona Horibe
trivia: Itona is one of the few students of 3-E to be called by his first name, the others are Nagisa Shiota and Karma Akabane.
Itona was called "Picture Book Graduate" during Class 3-E training using code names.
Itona's favorite subject is Science, while his least favorite is Social Science.
Itona's hobby/special skill is working with electronics.
Itona's prized possession is "Itona 1", a prototype robot he built with Class 3-E.
Itona's favorite food is Paitan Ramen.
Itona is the first student to discover Korosensei's heart was his weakness, most likely told by Shiro.

While under the influence of the tentacles, Itona followed Korosensei in almost every way. He had Korosensei's: sweet tooth, interest in big boobs, opaque expression, and ate all the same snacks Korosensei had.

name: Kaede Kayano
trivia: Kayano was called "Forever Flat" during Class 3-E training using code names. The one who wrote her code name was Takuya Muramatsu.
Kayano is represented as a bunny, although only once.
Kayano's hobby is karaoke-scoring.
Kayano's favorite food is pudding and has shown she has extensive knowledge of it.
She dislikes people that have a large bust except Toka Yada, her older sister Aguri Yukimura and later Irina Jelavić.
Kayano is the one who gave Koro-sensei his current name, which he has used ever since.

Kayano's inability to swim, her fixation on breasts and her love of sweets, are traits she shares with Korosensei and to a lesser extent, Itona, although she had her breast fixation even before the implantation. Her strong will, almost bordering on obsession, and drive once she decides to do something, however, is another key trait they share.

name: Nagisa Shiota
trivia: Nagisa's favorite subject is English, and his least favorite subject is Science.
Nagisa's hobby is research - especially into Koro-sensei's characteristics and potential weaknesses.
Nagisa is the shortest male student of Class 3-E.
Nagisa is considered to be a "herbivore" (草食系, sōshoku-kei), a male who tends to be a pushover or overtly nice.
Nagisa's plans for the bounty are to find a way to grow taller.
Nagisa's past club before dropping to Class E was Concert Club.

name: Yukiko Kanzaki
trivia: Kanzaki's favorite subject is Japanese while her least favorite is Chemistry.
Kanzaki's hobby/specialty is computer games and games in general.
Kanzaki's favorite food is Wagashi, which is a traditional Japanese confectionery.
Kanzaki's future goal is to become a nurse/caregiver.
Kanzaki's past club before dropping to Class 3-E was the Ikebana Club.
Kanzaki's most treasured item is a copy of Gradius.
Kanzaki's most recently mastered gaming genre is FPS (first-person shooter), which serves as the basis for her assassination techniques.

name: Ayumu Kasuga

source.titleJp: あずまんが大王 THE ANIMATION

trivia: Osaka speaks in the Osaka-ben dialect. When Tomo asked Osaka if she had lost her accent, she replies with "O-ha", which is Osaka-ben for "Ohayou" (Good morning) suggesting that she still uses some words in the Kansai dialect.
She likes fun facts, like "grains of truths".
Although her birthdate is not known, it's theorized that she was born in 1983-1984.

Osaka is shown to be bad at almost everything, ranging from schoolwork to P.E. (being able to become a P.E. teacher years later in spite of this). But she is good at riddle-solving, and (at least in the anime) is a quite decent singer.

name: Chiyo Mihama

source.titleJp: あずまんが大王 THE ANIMATION

trivia: She's 133 cm (about 4’4") tall in the beginning, but she grows by the time the series ends. There was one scene where Osaka led Chiyo to think Sakaki, who is exceptionally tall, had stolen Chiyo's height. Chiyo begins leaping at Sakaki, most likely just for the fun of it, asking for her to return her height.
Chiyo was born in March 1989.
She claims her greatest weakness, aside from having poor athletic abilities, is that she is bad at tongue-twisters.
Chiyo is said to have an overactive imagination. Because of this, she hates stories about painful accidents, something Tomo doesn't hesitate to take advantage of.
Chiyo is sometimes called "Chiyosuke" by Yukari and Tomo, usually as a way of teasing her.

Chiyo uses "-san" to other students, but she only uses "-chan" to Tomo, which implies that she respects her less due to her childish behavior. Even in the English dub, Chiyo uses "Miss/Ms." to other students, but calls Tomo just by her name.

name: Sakaki

source.titleJp: あずまんが大王 THE ANIMATION

trivia: Sakaki is 174 centimeters (approximately 5'8½") tall and is still growing. According to Kiyohiko Azuma, she is about 180 cm tall by the end.
Sakaki is terrible at drawing.
Her ideal career choices were veterinarian, florist and plushie salesperson.
She usually blushes easily.

Sakaki's breasts are 8 cm (3.14 in) bigger than Tomo Takino's as said by the latter in episode 1. When Sakaki revealed how big they really were to Tomo and Osaka, they were shocked and said "Is that even possible!?"
Sakaki was supposedly born in 1984 (or 1983).
Sakaki appears in every episode except episode 3.
Sakaki can be considered the deuteragonist of the series, as she has the second-most screentime and focus besides Chiyo.

name: Mayoi Hachikuji
trivia: Her family name before her parents got divorced was Tsunade (綱手).
Despite being a ghost, Mayoi cannot pass through walls, although she can restore her clothing into a pristine form if it receives any damage.
She doesn’t need to sleep nor eat but she can still choose to do so if she wanted to.
Her twin tail hair is meant to resemble a snail's antenna and her backpack as the snail’s shell. Without her backpack, she effectively becomes a “slug”.
Her backpack contains her pajamas.
Mayoi is the only main female character to never be depicted as having short hair in the series.
Mayoi refers to her audience as "lolicool" in the audio commentary tracks.

name: Naru Kotoishi
trivia: Naru loves beetles.
Naru shares her name with Naru Island, one of the Goto Islands in Japan.

source.titleJp: ビキニ・ウォリアーズ

name: Orihime Inoue
trivia: The color of Orihime's eyes vary from the manga to the anime. They are shown as brown in the manga while the anime depicts them as silver or gray.

name: Kobato Hasegawa

source.titleEng: Haganai: I don't have many friends

trivia: Just like her brother, Kobato's surname, Hasegawa (羽瀬川) literally means "Shallow River of Feathers".
Kobato's given name (小鳩) means "Little Dove".
Kobato claims to have access to the Akashic Records.
Kobato once said that she prefers Pepsi over coca cola.
Before becoming obsessed and influenced by her favorite anime. Her old hobbies include breaking chopsticks with her buttocks; this was not mentioned in the anime adaptation.

When in her vampire persona, Kobato would use "Ware" when referring to herself and would call Kodaka "my other half". However, when she reverts back to her normal personality, she would use "ucchi" (An Osaka dialect) to refer to herself and would call Kodaka "An-chan".
Kobato's favorite foods are meat dishes and pork ramen with lots of garlic.
In episode 2 of Boku wa Tomodachi ga Sukunai NEXT, the character in Sena's galge physically resembles Kobato.

name: Maria Takayama

source.titleEng: Haganai: I don't have many friends

trivia: Maria's surname, Takayama ( 高山 ) literally means "Tall Mountain".
Maria's surname, Takayama and her Catholic background may also be an allusion to the famous Christian-Daimiyo during the Sengoku (Japanese warring states era) period, Dom Justo Takayama.
Maria was voiced by Yuka Iguchi, who provided the voice of Index in the To Aru Majutsu no Index series. Like Maria, Index is a nun-in-training, they also look and behave very similar to each other.

The meaning of Maria's given name in Hebrew means "sea of bitterness" or "sea of sorrow." Some alternated meaning may mean "rebellion" or "wished-for-child". True to this, Maria's past is indeed rather bitter due to her attitude. Also, it could describe Maria's rebellious attitude. Kodaka comments in the manga that it's fitting that a nun is called Maria. This is because the first Catholics to set foot in Japan were from Portugal and so the Japanese for Mary is Maria just like in every country with Catholic influences.
Maria's favorite food is potato chips, and she also seems to have a liking for Nikujaga (Japanese Meat and Potato Stew).
The Neighbor's club-room was originally used by Maria for her afternoon naps.

Although in the anime, it was depicted that Maria was rude and constantly insults Yozora when asked to use the club-room before Yozora had enough of it and slapped Maria. In the manga and Light Novel, this event never really happened and hence, placed Maria in a better light than perceived in the anime.
After Aoi's and Kate's proclamation of Maria never becoming a nun and a teacher in the first place, the latter is just as confused and shocked as her fellow club members.
It was noted by Kodaka that Maria has larger breasts than that of Kobato's, much to the latter's chagrin.

Like with Kodaka, Maria is also a fan of the manga adaptation of the "Romance of the Three Kingdoms" series, where her favorite commander is Zhuge Liang, until Kodaka preached her of the achievements and merits of Zhang Liao and Wei Yan. As a result, Kodaka and Maria now share the same favorite commanders in the said series.

name: Sakura Kinomoto

source.titleJp: カードキャプターさくら

trivia: She and her Japanese voice actress Sakura Tange share the name "Sakura".
In the English Dub, her name was originally going to be changed to Nikki, but this was decided against.
Whenever she's distracted or shocked, she says "Hoeeee!" which is what she says in the Tokyopop manga although it's later changed to "Phwee?".

Sometimes, during cheer-leading practice, especially during baton throwing, Sakura will occasionally get distracted, causing the baton to hit her on the head which seems to be a running gag in the series.
Sakura has achieved notable popularity in Japan. In both 1999 and 2000, she won the Animage Grand Prix for Best Female Character. She also won the Anime Saimoe Tournament 2002.

name: Ayumi Otosaka
trivia: Ayumi adds pizza sauce to each and every single dish to help remind Yū Otosaka of their mother. It is also likely Maeda's reoccurring theme of the family "bad food/sauce" seen in Clannad and Kanon.
Ayumi often gets nosebleeds when overly excited.
Ayumi came back in Plunder since Yū and the others managed to use Yū's looted ability of time leaping.
Ayumi is a very big fan of Yusa Nishimori and the band How-Low-Hello or Haro-Haro.

name: Himeko Jougasaki
trivia: Jogasaki-san's favorite foods are chocolate parfait and french toast.
Jogasaki-san's favorite musical act is Candies.
Jogasaki-san's favorite sport is tennis.
Jogasaki-san dreams of becoming a stewardess and seeing the world.

name: Rikka Takanashi

source.titleJp: 中二病でも恋がしたい！

trivia: Rikka shares her birthday (June 12) with her English voice actress, Margaret McDonald.
She became a chunibyo after watching Yuuta/Dark Flame Master since she and Toka moved into their apartment in episode 10.
Rikka is the club leader of the Far Eastern Magic Nap Society (of Summer).
Rikka has the same voice actress as Koito Minase from the Musaigen no Phantom World series, another anime produced by Kyoto Animation.
